audit_policy.cost_note: Delaware residents aged 62+ may audit courses tuition-free on a space-available basis. Fees may still apply. Standard tuition applies to all other audit students.

senior_discount.notes: Delaware Code Title 14, §9009A allows Delaware residents aged 62+ to audit courses at Del Tech tuition-free on a space-available basis. Fees may still apply.

steps: Complete an admissions application at www.dtcc.edu.
Contact the campus Registrar's Office to request audit enrollment.
Register for the course during the normal enrollment period.
Confirm audit status with the registrar before the add/drop deadline.
Senior audit students (62+) must provide proof of age and Delaware residency.
application_process.timing: Register during the normal enrollment period. Audit requests should be submitted before the add/drop deadline.

restrictions: Instructor approval may be required for audit enrollment
Audit students do not receive grades or academic credit
Space availability may limit audit enrollment
Some courses may not be available for audit
Senior tuition waiver applies to tuition only; fees may still apply
